title: helianthus virilis
intro: Helianthus virilis, commonly known as the prairie sunflower, is a perennial plant native to the prairies of the Great Plains region in North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. The health benefits of Helianthus virilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
